channel.title: Policies on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Policies on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: Effective Data Protection Measures: Safeguarding Your Business with Maximum Security
item.category: "Data protection strategies" , "Information security" , "Cybersecurity measures" , "Data privacy" , "Compliance regulations" , "Risk assessment" , "Security audits" , "Employee training" , "Incident response planning" , "Long-term data protection"
item.description: Implementing effective data protection measures is crucial for safeguarding your business against unauthorized access and data breaches.

item.title: Automate FireFox STIG Compliance with PowerShell Scripts
item.category: "Firefox" , "STIG" , "Compliance" , "Automation" , "PowerShell" , "Script" , "Security" , "Configuration" , "Cybersecurity" , "IT" , "Information Technology" , "Policies" , "Management" , "Best Practices" , "Open-Source" , "Cyber Defense" , "Risk Management" , "Defense" , "Federal Agencies" , "Government Compliance"
item.description: Easily implement required FireFox STIG policies with a PowerShell script to ensure compliance.
